allow: Bash(cd "c:/Users/valse/OneDrive/Meute 6a/Scout2026" && echo "=== lanterne platformio.ini \($\(wc -c < lanterne_esp8266/platformio.ini\) bytes\) ===" && cat lanterne_esp8266/platformio.ini; echo ""; echo "=== balise platformio.ini ==="; cat balise_esp8266/balise_esp8266/platformio.ini)

PowerShell($root = "c:\\Users\\valse\\OneDrive\\Meute 6a\\Scout2026"; foreach \($f in @\("README.md", ".gitignore", "master_esp32\\platformio.ini", "master_esp32\\data\\config.json", "balise_esp8266\\platformio.ini", "balise_esp8266\\balise_esp8266\\platformio.ini", "lanterne_esp8266\\platformio.ini", "medaillon_esp8266\\platformio.ini", "diapason_digispark\\platformio.ini"\)\) { Write-Output "===== $f ====="; Get-Content \(Join-Path $root $f\) -Encoding UTF8 })

PowerShell($pio = "C:\\Users\\valse\\.platformio\\penv\\Scripts\\pio.exe"; $root = "c:\\Users\\valse\\OneDrive\\Meute 6a\\Scout2026"; foreach \($p in @\("balise_esp8266", "lanterne_esp8266", "medaillon_esp8266", "diapason_digispark"\)\) { Write-Output "########## $p ##########"; & $pio run -d "$root\\$p" 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "SUCCESS|FAILED|error|Error|RAM:|Flash:" | Select-Object -First 20 })

PowerShell($root = "c:\\Users\\valse\\OneDrive\\Meute 6a\\Scout2026\\balise_esp8266\\.pio\\build"; foreach \($e in @\("balise_nord","balise_sud","balise_est","balise_ouest"\)\) { $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("$root\\$e\\firmware.bin"\); $txt = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes\); $found = @\("Balise_Nord","Balise_Sud","Balise_Est","Balise_Ouest"\) | Where-Object { $txt.Contains\($_\) }; Write-Output "$e -> contient : $\($found -join ', '\)" })
